affinity.description: Affinity rules for pod scheduling. When unset and replicaCount > 1, a soft pod anti-affinity on kubernetes.io/hostname is automatically applied. Set to a non-empty affinity object to override.
affinity.title: affinity

extraArgs.description: Extra command-line arguments for Typesense server (e.g., ["--filter-by-max-ops=200"])
extraArgs.title: extraArgs

extraEnv.description: Extra environment variables for the Typesense container
extraEnv.title: extraEnv

fullnameOverride.description: Override the full name of the release (optional)
fullnameOverride.title: fullnameOverride

enabled.description: Enable or disable Gateway API for the application
enabled.title: enabled

hosts.description: List of hostnames the Gateway will route traffic for
hosts.title: hosts

parentRefs.description: Configuration controlling which Gateway(s) this HTTPRoute attaches to.

default.description: The default Gateway reference this HTTPRoute attaches to.

parentRefs.title: parentRefs

prefix.description: The URL path prefix for the application
prefix.title: prefix

global.description: Global values are values that can be accessed from any chart or subchart by exactly the same name.
global.title: global

tag.description: Overrides the image tag. If left empty, it uses the appVersion from Chart.yaml
tag.title: tag

annotations.description: Extra annotations to add to the Ingress resource
annotations.title: annotations

className.description: The name of the Ingress class to use (e.g., nginx)
className.title: className

enabled.description: Enable or disable Ingress for the application
enabled.title: enabled

hosts.description: List of hostnames the Ingress will route traffic for
hosts.title: hosts

prefix.description: The URL path prefix for the application
prefix.title: prefix

failureThreshold.description: Number of failed liveness checks before restarting the container
failureThreshold.title: failureThreshold

httpGet.description: HTTP GET path and port to check Typesense health for liveness
httpGet.title: httpGet

periodSeconds.description: Period (in seconds) to perform the liveness check
periodSeconds.title: periodSeconds

pullPolicy.description: Image pull policy for metrics exporter
pullPolicy.title: pullPolicy

resources.description: Resource requests and limits for the metrics sidecar
resources.title: resources

nameOverride.description: Override the name of the release (optional)
nameOverride.title: nameOverride

nodeSelector.description: Node selector to schedule pods on specific nodes (optional)
nodeSelector.title: nodeSelector

enabled.description: Enable PodDisruptionBudget for Typesense StatefulSet. Automatically skipped when replicaCount is 1.
enabled.title: enabled

maxUnavailable.description: Maximum number of pods that can be unavailable during disruption. Set to -1 (default) to auto-calculate as floor(replicaCount/2), preserving Raft quorum. Set to 0 to block all voluntary disruptions. Any positive value is used directly and must not exceed floor(replicaCount/2).
maxUnavailable.title: maxUnavailable

podAnnotations.description: Additional annotations to add to the Typesense pod(s)
podAnnotations.title: podAnnotations

podLabels.description: Additional labels to add to the Typesense pod(s)
podLabels.title: podLabels

fsGroup.description: Group ID for the filesystem of the Typesense container
fsGroup.title: fsGroup

runAsGroup.description: Group ID for running the Typesense process
runAsGroup.title: runAsGroup

runAsNonRoot.description: Ensure the container does not run as root
runAsNonRoot.title: runAsNonRoot

runAsUser.description: User ID for running the Typesense process
runAsUser.title: runAsUser

failureThreshold.description: Number of failed readiness checks before marking the pod as unready
failureThreshold.title: failureThreshold

httpGet.description: HTTP GET path and port to check Typesense readiness
httpGet.title: httpGet

periodSeconds.description: Period (in seconds) to perform the readiness check
periodSeconds.title: periodSeconds

replicaCount.description: Number of replicas for the Typesense deployment
replicaCount.title: replicaCount

resources.description: Resource requests and limits for the Typesense container
resources.title: resources

enabled.description: Enable or disable ExternalSecret creation (requires external-secrets operator)
enabled.title: enabled

extractKey.description: The key path to extract secrets from
extractKey.title: extractKey

storeName.description: The name of the ClusterSecretStore or SecretStore to use
storeName.title: storeName

optional.description: Whether the secretRef in envFrom is optional (pods start even if secret is missing)
optional.title: optional

secretName.description: Name of the Kubernetes Secret to mount via envFrom. Defaults to <fullname>-secret
secretName.title: secretName

readOnlyRootFilesystem.description: Read-only root filesystem (Typesense only writes to data PVC)
readOnlyRootFilesystem.title: readOnlyRootFilesystem

port.description: Port that the Typesense service will listen on
port.title: port

annotations.description: Annotations to add to the ServiceAccount (e.g., for IRSA)
annotations.title: annotations

automountServiceAccountToken.description: Whether to automount the ServiceAccount token
automountServiceAccountToken.title: automountServiceAccountToken

name.description: Name of the ServiceAccount. Defaults to fullname
name.title: name

failureThreshold.description: Number of failed startup checks before marking the container as unhealthy
failureThreshold.title: failureThreshold

httpGet.description: HTTP GET path and port to check Typesense health for startup
httpGet.title: httpGet

periodSeconds.description: Period (in seconds) to perform the startup check
periodSeconds.title: periodSeconds

className.description: Storage class to use for Persistent Volume Claims (PVC)
className.title: className

size.description: Size of the persistent storage volume (e.g., 10Gi)
size.title: size

terminationGracePeriodSeconds.description: Termination grace period in seconds. Typesense recommends 300s to allow graceful shutdown.
terminationGracePeriodSeconds.title: terminationGracePeriodSeconds

topologySpreadConstraints.description: Topology spread constraints for pod distribution across nodes/zones
topologySpreadConstraints.title: topologySpreadConstraints

flushInterval.description: How often analytics are persisted to disk in seconds. Unset uses Typesense default (3600)
flushInterval.title: flushInterval

numEntries.description: LRU cache size for search responses. Unset uses Typesense default (1000)
numEntries.title: numEntries

domains.description: List of allowed origins (no trailing slashes)
domains.title: domains

readLag.description: Update lag threshold before rejecting reads. Unset uses Typesense default (1000)
readLag.title: readLag

writeLag.description: Update lag threshold before rejecting writes. Unset uses Typesense default (500)
writeLag.title: writeLag

diskUsedMaxPercentage.description: Reject writes above this disk usage percentage. Unset uses Typesense default (100)
diskUsedMaxPercentage.title: diskUsedMaxPercentage

memoryUsedMaxPercentage.description: Reject writes above this memory usage percentage. Unset uses Typesense default (100)
memoryUsedMaxPercentage.title: memoryUsedMaxPercentage

slowRequestsTimeMs.description: Threshold in ms for slow request logging (-1 disables). Unset uses Typesense default (-1)
slowRequestsTimeMs.title: slowRequestsTimeMs

intervalSeconds.description: Replication log snapshot frequency in seconds. Unset uses Typesense default (3600)
intervalSeconds.title: intervalSeconds

threadPoolSize.description: Concurrent request handler threads. Unset uses Typesense default (NUM_CORES * 8)
threadPoolSize.title: threadPoolSize

updateStrategy.description: StatefulSet update strategy configuration. When type is RollingUpdate, rollingUpdate.maxUnavailable is required. When type is OnDelete, rollingUpdate is optional and ignored.

rollingUpdate.description: Rolling update configuration. Only used when type is RollingUpdate.

maxUnavailable.description: Maximum number of pods unavailable during a rolling update. Set to -1 to auto-calculate as floor(replicaCount/2). Set to 0 to block all voluntary pod replacements. Must not exceed floor(replicaCount/2).

type.description: StatefulSet update strategy type. Use RollingUpdate for zero-downtime upgrades or OnDelete for manual pod-by-pod control.

updateStrategy.title: updateStrategy
